metadata.description: Azure region for deployment
Unique environment name (e.g., prod, staging, dev). Drives deterministic resource naming.
Database type
Database admin username
Database admin password
Use an existing AKS cluster instead of creating one
Name of the existing AKS cluster (required when useExistingCluster=true)
Resource group of the existing AKS cluster (required when useExistingCluster=true)
Use an existing database server instead of creating one
FQDN of the existing database server (required when useExistingDatabase=true)
Name of the existing Pulse database
Name of the existing Pulse Logging database
Use an existing Service Bus namespace instead of creating one
Connection string of the existing Service Bus namespace (required when useExistingServiceBus=true)
Use an existing VNet instead of creating one
Resource ID of existing subnet for AKS nodes (required when useExistingVnet=true). Min /16.
Resource ID of existing subnet for Application Gateway for Containers (required when useExistingVnet=true). Min /24. Must be delegated to Microsoft.ServiceNetworking/trafficControllers.
Resource ID of existing subnet for private endpoints (required when useExistingVnet=true). Min /24.
Enable private endpoints for SQL, Key Vault, Service Bus, and Storage
Use existing private DNS zones instead of creating new ones
Resource group containing existing private DNS zones
Subscription ID containing existing private DNS zones (defaults to deployment subscription)
Service Bus SKU

properties.value: [if(not(variables('createDatabase')), variables('placeholderValue'), if(equals(parameters('databaseType'), 'sqlserver'), format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};User ID={2};Password={3};Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=True;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', format('sql-{0}', parameters('prefix'))), '2023-08-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, variables('pulseDatabaseName'), parameters('databaseUsername'), parameters('databasePassword')), format('Host={0};Port=5432;Database={1};Username={2};Password={3};SSL Mode=Require;Trust Server Certificate=true;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', format('pg-{0}', parameters('prefix'))), '2023-12-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, variables('pulseDatabaseName'), parameters('databaseUsername'), parameters('databasePassword'))))]

[if(not(variables('createDatabase')), variables('placeholderValue'), if(equals(parameters('databaseType'), 'sqlserver'), format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};User ID={2};Password={3};Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=True;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', format('sql-{0}', parameters('prefix'))), '2023-08-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, variables('pulseLoggingDatabaseName'), parameters('databaseUsername'), parameters('databasePassword')), format('Host={0};Port=5432;Database={1};Username={2};Password={3};SSL Mode=Require;Trust Server Certificate=true;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', format('pg-{0}', parameters('prefix'))), '2023-12-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, variables('pulseLoggingDatabaseName'), parameters('databaseUsername'), parameters('databasePassword'))))]

[if(not(variables('createDatabase')), if(empty(parameters('existingDatabaseServerFQDN')), variables('placeholderValue'), parameters('existingDatabaseServerFQDN')), if(variables('createSqlServer'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', format('sql-{0}', parameters('prefix'))), '2023-08-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', format('pg-{0}', parameters('prefix'))), '2023-12-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName))]

databaseServerFqdn.value: [if(not(variables('createDatabase')), parameters('existingDatabaseServerFQDN'), if(variables('createSqlServer'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', format('sql-{0}', parameters('prefix'))), '2023-08-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', format('pg-{0}', parameters('prefix'))), '2023-12-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName))]

parameters.peSubnetId: [if(parameters('useExistingVnet'), createObject('value', parameters('existingPeSubnetId')), createObject('value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}', variables('prefix'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('rpi-resources-{0}', variables('uniqueSuffix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.peSubnetId.value))]
parameters.sqlServerId: [if(equals(parameters('databaseType'), 'sqlserver'), createObject('value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}', variables('prefix'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('rpi-resources-{0}', variables('uniqueSuffix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.sqlServerId.value), createObject('value', ''))]
parameters.postgresServerId: [if(equals(parameters('databaseType'), 'postgresql'), createObject('value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}', variables('prefix'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('rpi-resources-{0}', variables('uniqueSuffix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.postgresServerId.value), createObject('value', ''))]
parameters.serviceBusId: [if(parameters('useExistingServiceBus'), createObject('value', ''), createObject('value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}', variables('prefix'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('rpi-resources-{0}', variables('uniqueSuffix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.serviceBusId.value))]
